title: Spiced Peanut Crunch Snack
description: A crunchy and tangy Indian-inspired snack made with peanuts, perfect for munching on the go.
instructions: In a pan, roast peanuts for 5 minutes, or until fragrant.
In a bowl, mix roasted peanuts, peanut butter, garam masala, brown sugar, and salt.
Add the mixture to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the mixture is lightly browned and crunchy.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
Break the mixture into pieces and store in an airtight container.
